\tzpentry{ID3355}{Magnon Neural Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3355 introduces Magnon Neural Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} H_{ \text{magnon-neural}} = \hbar \sum_k \omega_k a_k^ \dagger a_k + g_m \sum_{k,q} \left( a_k^ \dagger a_{k+q} S_q + \text{h.c.} \right) \end{equation}
